headline: Yamal dreams of World Cup goal after watching past tournaments
body: Lamine Yamal described scoring in his first World Cup start as a dream, recalling watching previous tournaments in class.
text:
🌎🇪🇸 Lamine Yamal: “Scoring in my first game as a starter in a World Cup feels like a dream”.

“Imagine I watched the previous World Cups in class!”.
draft_caption:
Unconfirmed report RUMOUR | Yamal dreams of World Cup goal after watching past tournaments
